Class SnapshotRenderer

java.lang.Object
shelter.cli.print.SnapshotRenderer
public final class SnapshotRenderer extends Object
Renders the full 8-section system snapshot as plain text. Used by both shelter print (writes to stdout) and by MarkdownRenderer (which wraps each section in a fenced code block). Section content is delegated to the package-private render* helpers on each CLI command class so formatting lives in exactly one place per entity.

    render(PrintWriter out)
    Writes the full snapshot to the given writer in a fixed 8-section order: Shelters, Animals, Adopters, Adoption Requests, Transfer Requests, Vaccine Types, Vaccinations, Audit Log.

  • Constructor Details

    • SnapshotRenderer

      public SnapshotRenderer(Supplier<List<Shelter>> shelters, Supplier<List<AnimalView>> animalViews, Supplier<List<Adopter>> adopters, Supplier<List<AdoptionRequest>> adoptionRequests, Supplier<List<TransferRequest>> transferRequests, Supplier<List<VaccineType>> vaccineTypes, Supplier<List<VaccinationRecordView>> vaccinationRecords, Supplier<List<AuditEntry<?>>> auditLog)
      Constructs a SnapshotRenderer from eight data-source suppliers. This primary constructor makes unit testing trivial — callers inject in-memory lambdas for each section without touching any singleton.
      Parameters:
      shelters - supplier of the shelter list; must not be null
      animalViews - supplier of the animal-view list; must not be null
      adopters - supplier of the adopter list; must not be null
      adoptionRequests - supplier of the adoption request list; must not be null
      transferRequests - supplier of the transfer request list; must not be null
      vaccineTypes - supplier of the vaccine type list; must not be null
      vaccinationRecords - supplier of the vaccination record view list; must not be null
      auditLog - supplier of the audit entry list; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

    • SnapshotRenderer

      public SnapshotRenderer(AppContext ctx)
      Constructs a SnapshotRenderer backed by the CLI's live application context. Each section fetches fresh data every time render(java.io.PrintWriter) is called.
      Parameters:
      ctx - the context used to obtain application services; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • render

      public void render(PrintWriter out)
      Writes the full snapshot to the given writer in a fixed 8-section order: Shelters, Animals, Adopters, Adoption Requests, Transfer Requests, Vaccine Types, Vaccinations, Audit Log. Each section is introduced by a === TITLE === line and separated from the next by a blank line.
      Parameters:
      out - the writer to print to; must not be null
